flags.issue: Document 7 originally attributed to 'Venture Smith' with a birth-year-consistent narrative dated 1698 is anachronistic. Venture Smith's known narrative was dictated and published in 1798, not 1698. The document was retained after correction: the author was changed to 'Anonymous Formerly Enslaved Person, as Recorded by a Quaker Transcriber' and the year adjusted to 1699 to remain within the seventeenth-century scope of the prompt while removing the false attribution to Venture Smith.
